subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-05-22
subcodes.first_line: The physical body has also a share. When I was in America a number of Christians came to me and asked a most subtle and difficult question.
subcodes.subjects: @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Christian clergy, @physical limitations of the Manifestation of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @connection between material and spiritual worlds
